offer: For independent accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual invoice processing causes late payments. We automate accounts payable and receivable instead of manual tracking and processing of invoices.
problem: manual invoice processing leads to late payments
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to independent accounting firms with demos
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try manual invoice entry and basic reporting dashboard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
